venues.name: R House Wynwood
venues.description: Dynamic Latin American restaurant in the heart of Wynwood's Arts District with a massive patio, known for its drag brunches and vibrant entertainment programming.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: $50/person F&B minimum; no rental fee; wedding packages $12,500-$35,000 for 100-200 guests

venues.name: Wynwood Walls
venues.description: World-famous outdoor street art museum surrounded by murals from internationally acclaimed artists -- the only place to host an event with iconic Wynwood street art as your backdrop.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Estimated $15,000-$25,000+ venue rental depending on date and scope; welcomes outside caterers; tiered open-bar packages available

venues.name: Arlo Wynwood Rooftop
venues.description: Stylish 9th-floor rooftop at the boutique Arlo hotel with a heated pool, panoramic Wynwood skyline views, colorful murals, and a dedicated rooftop bar -- ideal for upscale cocktail receptions.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Starts at $10,000 for events; includes rooftop bar and pool access; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: Mayami Wynwood
venues.description: Spectacular 8,500 sq ft open-air Mexican fusion restaurant with Oaxacan-inspired architecture, fire performers, aerialists, live DJs, and a lush courtyard -- a true dinner-and-a-show experience.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Starting at $42/person for private events; minimum spend varies by day; groups of 15+ for private events; patio seats 30 dinner / 50 cocktail

venues.name: Aether Room
venues.description: Intimate, vibrant 1,300 sq ft Wynwood event space with nightclub-grade sound system, intelligent lighting, DJ booth, dance floor, and two bars -- perfect for high-energy private parties.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: $1,500 minimum on weekend evenings; 4-hour rental minimum; weekday/daytime rates from $200/hr; weekend night rates $300-$700/hr based on guest count

venues.name: Collectors Club
venues.description: Stylish 4,000 sq ft Wynwood venue doubling as a premium sports and Pokemon card trading space, with a furnished lounge, bar area, outdoor patio, and kitchen access -- a unique backdrop for creative events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Parties from $2,000/event; standard rate $500/hr or $3,000 for full 8-hour rental; peak season rates higher during Art Basel, Ultra, Miami Grand Prix

venues.name: Rosa Sky Rooftop
venues.description: Elevated 3,500 sq ft rooftop lounge perched on the 22nd floor above Brickell with panoramic skyline views, handcrafted cocktails, globally inspired tapas, and a bold music lineup.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: $50/person table charge (applies toward bill); full buyout available for up to 150 guests; pricing varies by day/time; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: Rosa Negra Miami
venues.description: Luxury Latin fine dining spanning 13,600 sq ft in the heart of Brickell, featuring live Latin music, fire shows, bongo performances, and a resident DJ every night -- a showstopper for private events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Estimated F&B minimum varies by space and day; Amante speakeasy available for intimate private events; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: Sugar at EAST Miami
venues.description: Lush 40th-floor rooftop garden bar at the EAST hotel with a hand-carved Balinese bar, Asian-inspired cocktails and share plates, and sweeping panoramic views of Downtown Miami and Biscayne Bay.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: $100/person minimum for table bookings; full buyout pricing available on request; contact for private event packages

venues.name: TULUM at W Miami
venues.description: Sleek 15th-floor rooftop bar and restaurant at the W Miami with near 360-degree views of Miami and Biscayne Bay, a 120-seat indoor-outdoor layout, and a private dining room for exclusive events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Private dining room and full buyout available; pricing varies by day/time; contact hotel events team for custom proposals

venues.name: EDGE at Four Seasons Miami
venues.description: Refined private dining at Four Seasons Miami with two fully privatized rooms featuring wall-to-wall Biscayne Bay views, plus an alfresco terrace -- the gold standard for intimate luxury events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Two private rooms seat 12 or 22; EDGE Terrace up to 45 cocktail; custom menus by Four Seasons culinary team; contact for pricing

venues.name: Quinto La Huella
venues.description: Warm, inviting 9,700 sq ft South American wood-fire restaurant on the 5th floor of EAST Miami, with indoor/outdoor dining, a private room (El Faro), and sweeping Brickell City Centre views.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: El Faro private room seats 14; full restaurant available for buyout; preset menus available; contact for pricing

venues.name: The Moore
venues.description: Reimagined 1920s landmark building spanning 90,000 sq ft in the Design District, anchored by a Zaha Hadid installation, with Michelin-starred catering, a boutique hotel, private club, and grand central atrium.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Estimated rental fee varies significantly by space and configuration; catering by Michelin-starred Chef Joe Anthony; cocktails by Nico de Soto; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: Paradise Plaza Event Space
venues.description: Striking 7,800 sq ft indoor-outdoor event space in the Design District with floor-to-ceiling windows, views of Museum Garage, accordion-style doors opening to a garden oasis, and full production capabilities.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Venues leased on a daily basis (24 hours, 5:59am to 5:59am); pricing not publicly listed -- contact events@miamidesigndistrict.net for proposals

venues.name: MC Kitchen
venues.description: Beloved Italian restaurant in the Design District with a Chef's Dining Room for intimate gatherings and a full main dining room for buyouts, featuring custom menus with wine pairings and premium AV.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Chef's Dining Room up to 14 guests with custom menus and wine pairings; main dining room up to 120 seated; full restaurant buyout 120+ guests; contact for pricing

venues.name: Mandolin Aegean Bistro
venues.description: Michelin Bib Gourmand Greek-Turkish garden bistro set in a charming bungalow near the Design District, with a lush courtyard, preset menus for groups, and full buyout options for up to 220 guests.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Groups 9-50 with preset menus; private space fee for 30-50 guests; full buyout for 51-220 guests; all packages priced per person; events 12pm-9pm only

venues.name: The Temple House
venues.description: Iconic 16,000 sq ft Art Deco event venue in the heart of South Beach with 25-foot ceilings, a dramatic mezzanine, 360° projection architecture, and fully private standalone building — the gold standard for luxury events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Estimated $20,000-$50,000+ venue rental depending on date, season, and configuration; includes full production capabilities; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: 1 Hotel South Beach
venues.description: Luxury beachfront hotel with 23,000+ sq ft of versatile event space including the Watr rooftop, Habitat restaurant, Plnthouse with ocean terrace, and the 50,000 sq ft Tala Beach oasis — nature-inspired elegance for events of any scale.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Multiple spaces from intimate dinners to full beach buyouts; pricing varies significantly by space, date, and scope; contact hotel events team

venues.name: Kimpton Angler's Hotel
venues.description: Boutique Art Deco hotel in the heart of South Beach with two brand-new event spaces — the 2,500 sq ft SoBe Room and the 1,470 sq ft SoBe Terrace — plus a lush pool courtyard perfect for intimate and mid-size events.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: SoBe Room (2,500 sq ft) and SoBe Terrace (1,470 sq ft) available separately or combined; pricing varies by day and configuration; contact events team

venues.name: Fairchild Tropical Botanic Garden
venues.address: 10901 Old Cutler Rd, Coral Gables, FL 33156
venues.description: Sprawling 83-acre tropical garden with multiple stunning event spaces — the Garden House, lakeside marquee tent, and Arts Center — surrounded by rare palms, rainforest, and coastal habitat. Miami's most magical outdoor venue.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Base rental $3,400-$7,000 for up to 75 guests (5 hours); additional guests $30/person; Garden House up to 250 seated; Lakeside Tent up to 450 seated; Arts Center up to 175 seated

venues.hours: Events by arrangement; garden open daily 9:30am-4:30pm

venues.name: Coral Gables Country Club
venues.address: 997 N Greenway Dr, Coral Gables, FL 33134
venues.description: Historic country club with elegant ballroom, lush outdoor spaces, and sweeping green views — a classic Coral Gables setting for weddings, galas, and corporate events with capacity up to 1,000 guests.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Refundable security deposit $2,000 (daytime) / $3,000 (evening); venue rental varies by space, day, and guest count; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: THesis Hotel Miami
venues.address: 1350 S Dixie Hwy, Coral Gables, FL 33146
venues.description: Modern lifestyle hotel near the University of Miami with 20,000+ sq ft of flexible indoor and outdoor event space, a rooftop pool, multiple restaurants, and contemporary design throughout.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: 20,000+ sq ft of flexible event space; multiple configurations available; contact hotel events team for custom proposals

venues.name: Vizcaya Museum & Gardens
venues.description: Breathtaking Italian Renaissance-style villa on Biscayne Bay with 10 acres of formal gardens, a stone barge, and ornate interiors — Miami's most iconic and photographed event venue for weddings and galas.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Daytime garden ceremonies from $2,000 (up to 25 guests, +$25/additional guest); evening rentals significantly higher; parking for 125 cars included in evening rental; police required for 200+ guests ($150/hr each)

venues.hours: Events by arrangement; museum open Wed-Mon 9:30am-4:30pm

venues.name: Mayfair House Hotel & Garden
venues.description: Boutique hotel in the heart of Coconut Grove with 18,000+ sq ft of event space across 12 unique venues — from a wood-paneled ballroom with vaulted ceilings to an outdoor terrace and rooftop rum bar, plus catering by Lost Boy & Co.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: 12 unique event spaces; ballroom up to 300 seated; terrace up to 350; catering by Lost Boy & Co.; contact events team for pricing

venues.name: Mr. C Coconut Grove
venues.description: Italian luxury hotel by the Cipriani family with a 2,500 sq ft indoor event space, wraparound terrace, and Port-Cochere for up to 400 guests — refined European elegance meets tropical Coconut Grove charm.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Indoor event space 2,500 sq ft; Port-Cochere accommodates up to 400; Cipriani-level catering; contact hotel events team for custom proposals

venues.name: Little River Studios
venues.description: Sprawling 10,000 sq ft indoor-outdoor production and event space on an acre of land in Miami's creative Little River district — a blank canvas for weddings, festivals, brand activations, and large-scale events up to 2,750 guests.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Events range from $2,500-$100,000; minimum spend $5,000; half-day, full-day, and multi-day rentals available; multiple indoor-outdoor spaces

venues.name: The Citadel
venues.description: Multi-level food hall and event complex in Little River with a 5,000 sq ft rooftop bar offering sweeping views, a 4,000 sq ft indoor mezzanine, and a 500-capacity entertainment space — vibrant, creative, and endlessly versatile.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Rooftop semi-private up to 100 guests; mezzanine 4,000 sq ft for brand launches, galleries, banquets; entertainment space up to 500; contact for pricing

venues.name: Biltmore Hotel
venues.description: A National Historic Landmark featuring Mediterranean Revival architecture with over 75,000 sq ft of indoor/outdoor event space — three ballrooms, terraces, an amphitheater, and Miami's most legendary pool. The definitive grand venue.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Estimated $15,000-$75,000+ depending on space, date, and scope; three ballrooms; outdoor terraces and amphitheater; in-house catering by award-winning culinary team

venues.name: Ball & Chain
venues.description: Legendary live music venue on Calle Ocho open since 1935, blending Cuban culture with vibrant nightlife — salsa dancers, award-winning musicians, DJs, authentic cigar rollers, and an electric open-air pineapple-shaped stage in the back garden.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: F&B minimum varies by space and day; back garden with pineapple stage available for private events; full venue buyout for larger events; contact for pricing

venues.name: Café La Trova
venues.description: Michelin-recognized Cuban cocktail bar and restaurant on Calle Ocho by celebrity chef Michelle Bernstein and master cantinero Julio Cabrera — three configurable sections with traditional folding doors, live entertainment, and world-class cocktails.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Starting at $550 for smaller sections; full venue buyout for up to 350 guests; three configurable spaces with folding doors; contact for custom proposals

venues.name: Pérez Art Museum Miami (PAMM)
venues.description: World-class waterfront art museum designed by Herzog & de Meuron with stunning Biscayne Bay views, hanging gardens, and 120,000 sq ft of dramatic architecture — the ultimate backdrop for sophisticated corporate events, galas, and celebrations.

pricing.minimumSpendNotes: Venue rental varies by space and date; East Terrace and West Terrace available; gallery spaces for cocktail receptions; contact events team for proposals

venues.hours: Events by arrangement; museum open Thu-Mon
